summary: Platform and DevOps engineer experienced in cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and automation at scale. Proficient with GCP, AWS, and container orchestration.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Worked in a team of 6+ people building an ED Platform that helped automate tasks, optimize processes, and maximize productivity
